testcase.name: test_01_login_barnetharris
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_beneficiary_invitation.py:43: in test_01_login_barnetharris assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Invalid credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_02_get_estates

failure.message: AttributeError: type object 'TestBeneficiaryInvitationFlow' has no attribute 'token'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_beneficiary_invitation.py:71: in test_02_get_estates assert self.__class__.token, "No token - login test must pass first" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: type object 'TestBeneficiaryInvitationFlow' has no attribute 'token'
